email_text:
Subject: URGENT: Suspicious sign-in to your admin account
From: security@auth0.com
Snippet: action required
Body:
We detected a sign-in from an unrecognized device in Lagos, Nigeria 5 minutes ago. If this wasn't you, your admin credentials may be compromised. Reset your password and revoke active sessions immediately.

Subject: Payment failed - subscription pauses tomorrow
From: billing@stripe.com
Snippet: update card
Body:
Your invoice of $129.00 could not be charged. If we cannot collect by tomorrow at 23:59 UTC, the production plan will be downgraded and API keys disabled.

Subject: Customer escalation - Acme is threatening to cancel
From: csm@vendor.com
Snippet: please call
Body:
Acme's CTO just escalated. They want a fix on the data export bug by EOD or they'll cancel the $40k/yr renewal. Please call me back today.

Subject: Court summons - response required within 7 days
From: clerk@statecourt.gov
Snippet: case 24-CV-1192
Body:
You are hereby served notice of civil case 24-CV-1192. A written response must be filed within 7 days of receipt. Failure to respond may result in default judgment.

Subject: Meeting next week to review the proposal
From: alice@acme-corp.com
Snippet: quick sync
Body:
Hey - can we meet next Tuesday to walk through the ACME proposal? I'm free after 2pm.

Subject: Q2 board deck draft for your review
From: chief-of-staff@company.com
Snippet: feedback by Mon
Body:
Attached is the v3 draft of the Q2 board deck. The board meets a week from Monday - please leave comments by end of day Monday so I can finalize.

Subject: Reference check call for Maya - 30 min
From: recruiter@talent.io
Snippet: this week
Body:
Maya listed you as a reference for the Staff Engineer role. Could we schedule a 30 minute call sometime this week? Tuesday or Thursday afternoon both work for me.

Subject: Invoice INV-2041 ready for approval
From: ap@vendor.io
Snippet: net-30
Body:
Invoice INV-2041 for $4,250 (May consulting hours) is ready for approval in the AP portal. Net-30, no rush, but please approve when you get a chance.

Subject: Your weekly deals are here - 40% off everything
From: promo@shopping.com
Snippet: this week only
Body:
This week only: huge discounts on everything in store. Click here to shop. Unsubscribe link below.

Subject: LinkedIn weekly digest: 5 jobs you might like
From: jobs-noreply@linkedin.com
Snippet: based on your profile
Body:
Here are 5 new roles based on your profile and saved searches. View all jobs in your feed. Manage email preferences in settings.

Subject: Your monthly product newsletter is here
From: news@notion.so
Snippet: what's new
Body:
New this month: AI shortcuts, improved table sync, and a fresh template gallery. Read the full release notes on our blog.

Subject: Receipt for your order #A8821-22
From: noreply@amazon.com
Snippet: order shipped
Body:
Your order #A8821-22 (USB-C cable) has shipped and will arrive Tuesday. No action required. View order details in your account.
